element_introduction_order.mastery_context: primary offensive mechanic for defeating enemies
combat timing and positioning refined through progression
optional scoring system running parallel to progression
secondary resource alongside main progression objective
requires environmental exploration with club strikes
point multipliers and variety in collectible types
mandatory objective replacing food quota system from predecessor
pacing constraint requiring strategic pauses after extended running
pattern recognition and sustained combat through later levels
optional challenge content (3 bonus levels total)
meta-rewards for thorough exploration and club striking

typical_relief_triggers: reaching safe zones between enemy clusters
defeating boss and advancing to next level
typical_tension_triggers: stamina depletion during extended running sequences
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: moderate with cyclical tension peaks at boss encounters; stamina mechanic creates natural breathing room between action sequences; exploration of hidden items provides optional relief from direct progression pressure

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: striking club on ground/walls reveals hidden food items; areas with visually distinct surfaces or alcoves suggest hidden collectibles
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: club strikes on seemingly empty areas trigger food item reveals; collection of team photographs requires discovery of specific secret locations

difficulty_curve.early_game: introduction to core mechanics (walking, jumping, club strikes) against basic animal enemies; lighter item discovery drives progression
difficulty_curve.mid_game: stamina mechanic becomes significant constraint; enemy variety increases; boss encounters introduce pattern recognition requirements
difficulty_curve.late_game: culmination of mechanics mastery; complex boss patterns; optional bonus levels provide extended challenge
notable_spikes: first boss encounter (establishes boss combat expectations)
final main level boss before bonus content

notable_level_patterns.description: player alternates between active platforming/combat sections and slower exploration phases where club strikes reveal hidden food; tension releases when items are discovered
notable_level_patterns.example_level: early levels establish this pattern for reuse

notable_level_patterns.description: each level requires finding a lighter item before advancing; this replaces predecessor's food quota system with single-objective clarity
humorous end-of-level bosses serve as finale encounter; each boss represents distinct pattern to learn
extended running distances followed by forced pauses; creates rhythmic breaks in action intensity
notable_level_patterns.example_level: mid-to-late levels where running distance increases
